'''yayuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qomuz|qomuz]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-y-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qomuz|qomuz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yayuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæyizith|yæyizith]] || [[word:yæyizij|yæyizij]] || [[word:yæyizish|yæyizish]] || [[word:yæyizi|yæyizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yayuyuzuth|yayuyuzuth]] || [[word:yayuyuzuj|yayuyuzuj]] || [[word:yayuyuzush|yayuyuzush]] || [[word:yayuyuzu|yayuyuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yayuzuth|yayuzuth]] || [[word:yayuzuj|yayuzuj]] || [[word:yayuzush|yayuzush]] || [[word:yayuzu|yayuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yayufzuth|yayufzuth]] || [[word:yayufzuj|yayufzuj]] || [[word:yayufzush|yayufzush]] || [[word:yayufzuf|yayufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yayuzuthu|yayuzuthu]] || [[word:yayuzuju|yayuzuju]] || [[word:yayuzushu|yayuzushu]] || [[word:yayuzuku|yayuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yayuzuth|yayuzuth]] || [[word:yayuzuj|yayuzuj]] || [[word:yayuzush|yayuzush]] || [[word:yayuzu|yayuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yayuzuthul|yayuzuthul]] || [[word:yayuzujul|yayuzujul]] || [[word:yayuzushul|yayuzushul]] || [[word:yayuzukul|yayuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yayuzuthuthu|yayuzuthuthu]] || [[word:yayuzujuju|yayuzujuju]] || [[word:yayuzushushu|yayuzushushu]] || [[word:yayuzuku|yayuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yayuzuthun|yayuzuthun]] || [[word:yayuzujun|yayuzujun]] || [[word:yayuzushun|yayuzushun]] || [[word:yayuzukun|yayuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yayuzuthuoro|yayuzuthuoro]] || [[word:yayuzujuoro|yayuzujuoro]] || [[word:yayuzushuoro|yayuzushuoro]] || [[word:yayuzukuoro|yayuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
